channel.title: base64 on geobour98
channel.description: Recent content in base64 on geobour98

item.title: TryHackMe - Tech_Supp0rt: 1
item.description: Introduction This is a TryHackMe room which can be found at: Tech_Supp0rt: 1 Hack into the scammer’s under-development website to foil their plans. Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.182.202 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.182.202 Starting Nmap 7.93 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2023-01-05 19:55 EET Nmap scan report for 10.10.182.202 (10.10.182.202) Host is up (0.086s latency). Not shown: 65531 closed tcp ports (conn-refused) PORT STATE SERVICE 22/tcp open ssh 80/tcp open http 139/tcp open netbios-ssn 445/tcp open microsoft-ds Nmap done: 1 IP address (1 host up) scanned in 62.

item.title: TryHackMe - VulnNet: Node
item.description: Introduction This is a TryHackMe room which can be found at: VulnNet: Node After the previous breach, VulnNet Entertainment states it won’t happen again. Can you prove they’re wrong? Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.213.208 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.213.208 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-09-04 10:44 EEST Initiating Ping Scan at 10:44 Scanning 10.

item.title: TryHackMe - Jason
item.description: Introduction This is a TryHackMe room which can be found at: Jason In JavaScript everything is a terrible mistake. Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.121.122 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -v 10.10.121.122 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-08-31 19:39 EEST Initiating Ping Scan at 19:39 Scanning 10.10.121.122 [2 ports] Completed Ping Scan at 19:39, 0.07s elapsed (1 total hosts) Initiating Parallel DNS resolution of 1 host.
